title: Abiraterone or Enzalutamide for Patients With Metastatic Castration-Sensitive Prostate Cancer: A Nationwide Veterans Affairs Study.
abstract: Enzalutamide or abiraterone, combined with androgen-deprivation therapy, is standard of care for metastatic castration-sensitive prostate cancer (mCSPC). However, no trials have compared these drugs. This study compared clinical outcomes in patients with mCSPC treated with enzalutamide or abiraterone.
trial_name: Enzalutamide in metastatic prostate cancer before chemotherapy
